title: I am a genius
content:
I am a genius

I work hard in all aspects of my life

I am a very talented musician

I am a very talented writer

I am a beautiful and exceptionally good looking individual

I will be world renown by my 27th birthday

I will be free and at peace with the world and myself

I will always remember how far i've come

I will always be successful

I will be the next Jim Morrison

I will be the next Marilyn Manson

I will be the next Thom Yorke

I will inspire just as those who have inspired me

I will always put all my being into my creations

I am the master of my destiny

Life does not offer set backs, only set ups

I will not do drugs habitually
context: From document: I am a genius
